creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
Confirmed fixed with basically the same, but slightly different way.
  *Minimum version of setputool is specified.
  *Order of items.

Anyway, now built fine on poudriere.
(Delete already-built pkg from poudriere data directory and rebuilt.)
Thanks!

Closing manually, as this PR is not mentioned on commit message and didn't auto-closed.
